mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TF_PROJECT WHERE STATUS = 'ONGOING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TF_TASK WHERE TRUNC(DUE_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND STATUS != 'DONE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TF_TASK WHERE DUE_DATE < SYSDATE AND STATUS != 'DONE'

SELECT p.ID, p.NAME AS projectName, u.NAME AS pmName, COUNT(DISTINCT pm.USER_ID) AS memberCount, COUNT(t.ID) AS remainTaskCount, p.END_DATE FROM TF_PROJECT p JOIN TF_USER u ON p.OWNER_USER_ID = u.EMPNO LEFT JOIN TF_PROJECT_MEMBER pm ON p.ID = pm.PROJECT_ID LEFT JOIN TF_TASK t ON p.ID = t.PROJECT_ID AND t.STATUS != 'DONE' GROUP BY p.ID, p.NAME, u.NAME, p.END_DATE ORDER BY p.ID DESC
